title: Roasted Mediterranean Pasta
description: A flavorful pasta dish featuring roasted vegetables and tangy parmesan cheese. This Mediterranean-inspired recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Toss Mediterranean roast vegetables in olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread vegetables on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes.
In a large skillet, combine cooked pasta, roasted vegetables, and parmesan cheese.
Toss to combine and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
